# Prompt Files

This folder contains Cursor Agent prompt files used to drive the AI-assisted 
QA workflow in this project.

## Categories

| Folder | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `manual-runs/` | MCP manual test execution sessions |
| `manual-test-cases/` | Generate formal test cases from session reports |
| `automation-test-cases/` | Generate and implement Playwright spec files |
| `setup-and-maintenance/` | Project setup and ongoing maintenance tasks |

## How to Use
Open a new Agent chat in Cursor, reference the relevant prompt file, 
and provide any required inputs. Feature-specific files reference their 
category `base-template.md` for shared rules.
